cases.label: 21:38 VN natural Full Set sentence
cases.expectedSpoken: Full Set today at 3 PM with Amy.
cases.whyItFailed: ASR produced "so we'll set today at three p m with amy". The previous Full Set recovery did not include that alias, so serviceName stayed unset while date/time/staff were captured and the bot asked for service.
